system: hand-drawn custom SVG set — no production icon library
doNotUse: @phosphor-icons/react — installed but used in exactly one legacy file (src/features/workflow/components/EvaluationFormBuilder.tsx)
convention: Feather/Lucide-style stroke icon; factory pattern base = (d, props) => (overrideProps) => <svg .../>

sizeExceptions.note: the one deliberately larger icon context in the system

inventoryApprox: ~40 icons covering nav, actions (plus/check/trash/edit/copy), files (upload/download/link), arrows/chevrons, status (eye/eye-off/warning), domain (award/building/globe/qr/kanban/users/bell)
